name: FOXO TECHNOLOGIES INC.
business: FOXO Technologies Inc. operates four divisions: a rural hospital and mental/behavioral health services division, a biospecimen sourcing division serving pharmaceutical and biotechnology research, and an epigenetics diagnostics division for life insurance underwriting.

exposures.sentence: an epigenetics diagnostics and interpretation division
Our Labs segment is commercializing proprietary epigenetic biomarker technology to be used for underwriting risk classification in the global life insurance industry.
Vector is focused on sourcing and distributing high-quality biological materials, such as blood and urine, and providing data services to the pharmaceutical and biotechnology research sectors.

research and development in the fields of health and wellness testing powered by machine learning and artificial intelligence (including a potential AI platform for the delivery of health and well-being data-driven insights to individuals, healthcare professionals and third-party service providers).
We currently operate four synergistic divisions: (i) a rural hospital division; (ii) a mental and behavioral health division;

catalysts.event: BSF expanded clinical capabilities with tele-specialty and cardiac diagnostics
catalysts.sentence: On January 20, 2026, the Company announced that BSF expanded its clinical capabilities through the addition of tele-specialty services and cardiac diagnostics.

catalysts.event: FINRA subcommittee review of reverse stock split appeal
catalysts.sentence: FINRA has scheduled a review date of April 27, 2026.
